prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt) engine build with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression ratio forged pistons, paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 32 psi peak boost on E85 fuel

Full bolt-on intake and exhaust system: HKS Super Power Flow Gen 2 front-mount intercooler (600hp capacity), Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold with 3-inch downpipe, and a custom 3.5-inch MagnaFlow cat-back exhaust with dual 4-inch titanium tips for optimal spool and flow

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom 4D ignition and fuel maps, integrated with an AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor and Motec C125 dash for real-time data logging, supporting sequential fuel injection with ID1000x injectors and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a one-off duckbill rear spoiler (hand-laid by Seibon Carbon), retaining the Spyder’s retractable soft-top mechanism

Custom two-tone paint scheme: BASF Glasurit 90-Line 'Lime Crush' (Mitsubishi’s original 1999 concept color) with matte black accents on the hood, roof, and rear diffuser, applied by House of Kolor-certified painters with a 20-layer clearcoat for depth

OEM+ interior overhaul: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (retaining the Spyder’s power seat mechanisms) wrapped in Alcantara with custom 'GS-T Spyder' embroidery, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel and a custom aluminum shift knob (machined from billet by 5-axis CNC) for the Getrag F5M42 5-speed transmission
